prompt: Improve the StatsScreen UI — it looks too plain with just text. Keep the minimal editorial style.

assertions.text: References AppTextStyles.* constants (not raw GoogleFonts.lora() or inline TextStyle with font families)
References AppColors.* constants (no Color(0xFF...) literals in the widget)
References AppSpacing.* constants for at least some spacing (not all raw SizedBox heights)
Uses flutter_animate (.animate() with .fadeIn() or .moveY()) for entry animations
No Card() widgets or BoxDecoration with boxShadow — design remains flat
No Colors.blue, Colors.green, Colors.purple, Colors.teal, or similar colorful accent references
Has visual progress indicators (LinearProgressIndicator, custom bars, or fraction-based containers) rather than text-only accuracy/category stats
